TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bounnhang_Vorachith, title = Bounnhang_Vorachith, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bounnhang_Vorachith} }

S.FORM: I 1938 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bounnhang Vorachith , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Laos anini i ci Bounnhang Vorachith, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~vo~uo~u~unnńßaŇč b~vo~ura ¶ńßitńß , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺao~us anini i ¶i b~b~vo~uo~u~unnńßaŇč b~vo~ura ¶ńßitńß, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1938 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bounnhang Vorachith , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Laos anini i ci Bounnhang Vorachith, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
